trace.query: 按季度统计已支付订单（pay_status为paid或partial_refund）的GMV，并计算去年同季度同比增长率；输出季度、GMV、去年同期GMV、同比增长率，按季度升序。
trace.rewritten_query: 按季度统计已支付订单（pay_status为paid或partial_refund）的GMV，并计算去年同季度同比增长率；输出季度、GMV、去年同期GMV、同比增长率，按季度升序。

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

few_shot_examples.question: 各月份销售额同比去年的增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,4) AS year, substr(order_date,6,2) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,4), substr(order_date,6,2)) SELECT year, month, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY month, year

few_shot_examples.question: 各物流公司的平均配送时长（天）
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT logistics_companies.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(AVG(julianday(shipments.delivered_at) - julianday(shipments.shipped_at)), 2) AS metric_value FROM shipments JOIN logistics_companies ON shipments.company_id = logistics_companies.company_id WHERE shipments.shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY logistics_companies.company_id, logistics_companies.name ORDER BY metric_value

trace.query: 按月份统计成功支付金额、成功退款金额和净收款；支付月份取payments.paid_at，退款月份取refunds.refunded_at，按月份升序。
trace.rewritten_query: 按月份统计成功支付金额、成功退款金额和净收款；支付月份取payments.paid_at，退款月份取refunds.refunded_at，按月份升序。

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

few_shot_examples.question: 各支付方式的成功交易金额分布
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT method AS dimension_value, SUM(amount) AS metric_value FROM payments WHERE status = 'success' GROUP BY method ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 各月份销售额同比去年的增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,4) AS year, substr(order_date,6,2) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,4), substr(order_date,6,2)) SELECT year, month, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY month, year

trace.query: 统计已支付订单中销售额最高的10个商品品类毛利率；销售额用order_items.subtotal，成本用skus.cost乘以销量。
trace.rewritten_query: 统计已支付订单中销售额最高的10个商品品类毛利率；销售额用order_items.subtotal，成本用skus.cost乘以销量。

few_shot_examples.question: 销量最高的10个商品
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT skus.sku_name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS rn FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id GROUP BY skus.sku_id, skus.sku_name) ranked WHERE rn <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 各商品品类的销售额占比
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT categories.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.subtotal) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN categories ON spus.category_id = categories.category_id GROUP BY categories.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 销量排名前10的品牌
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT brands.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.name) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

trace.query: 按收货省份统计已支付订单数、销售额和客单价，仅保留订单数不少于50的省份，按客单价从高到低取前10。
trace.rewritten_query: 按收货省份统计已支付订单数、销售额和客单价，仅保留订单数不少于50的省份，按客单价从高到低取前10。

few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT receiver_province AS dimension_value, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders WHERE receiver_province IS NOT NULL GROUP BY receiver_province ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT brands.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.name) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

trace.query: 比较已支付订单的优惠来源组合：仅优惠券、仅促销、券和促销同时使用、无优惠；四类组合都输出，按预设顺序展示订单数、商品金额、优惠金额和优惠率。

few_shot_examples.question: 优惠券整体核销率
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS metric_value FROM user_coupons

few_shot_examples.question: 销量排名前10的品牌
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT brands.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.name) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 销量最高的10个商品
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT skus.sku_name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS rn FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id GROUP BY skus.sku_id, skus.sku_name) ranked WHERE rn <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 各商品品类的销售额占比
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT categories.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.subtotal) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN categories ON spus.category_id = categories.category_id GROUP BY categories.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

trace.query: 查询当前库存低于安全库存的SKU-仓库组合，输出缺口量，并按缺口量最大取前20。
trace.rewritten_query: 查询当前库存低于安全库存的SKU-仓库组合，输出缺口量，并按缺口量最大取前20。

few_shot_examples.question: 库存低于安全库存需要补货的商品
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT skus.sku_name, warehouses.name AS warehouse, inventory.quantity, inventory.safety_stock FROM inventory JOIN skus ON inventory.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN warehouses ON inventory.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id WHERE inventory.quantity < inventory.safety_stock ORDER BY inventory.quantity

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

few_shot_examples.question: 各仓库的出库总量
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT warehouses.name AS dimension_value, SUM(CASE WHEN inventory_movements.movement_type = 'outbound' THEN inventory_movements.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS metric_value FROM inventory_movements JOIN warehouses ON inventory_movements.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id GROUP BY warehouses.warehouse_id, warehouses.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

trace.query: 按仓库统计当前库存件数、仓库容量、库容利用率和低库存SKU数量，按库容利用率从高到低排序。

few_shot_examples.question: 各物流公司的平均配送时长（天）
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT logistics_companies.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(AVG(julianday(shipments.delivered_at) - julianday(shipments.shipped_at)), 2) AS metric_value FROM shipments JOIN logistics_companies ON shipments.company_id = logistics_companies.company_id WHERE shipments.shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY logistics_companies.company_id, logistics_companies.name ORDER BY metric_value

few_shot_examples.question: 用户复购率（下单2次及以上的用户占比）

few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT logistics_companies.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(AVG(julianday(shipments.delivered_at) - julianday(shipments.shipped_at)), 2) AS metric_value FROM shipments JOIN logistics_companies ON shipments.company_id = logistics_companies.company_id WHERE shipments.shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY logistics_companies.company_id, logistics_companies.name ORDER BY metric_value

trace.rewritten_query: 按退款原因和原支付方式统计成功退款笔数与退款金额，按退款金额取前10。

few_shot_examples.question: 各支付方式的成功交易金额分布
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT method AS dimension_value, SUM(amount) AS metric_value FROM payments WHERE status = 'success' GROUP BY method ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

few_shot_examples.question: 销量排名前10的品牌
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT brands.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.name) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

trace.query: 按来源统计2024年浏览、加购、收藏、分享四类行为的去重用户数，按浏览用户数降序。

few_shot_examples.question: 浏览、加购、下单各环节的用户数转化漏斗
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'view') AS view_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'add_cart') AS add_cart_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders) AS order_users

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

few_shot_examples.question: 商品评价的评分分布
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT rating AS dimension_value, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating

few_shot_examples.question: 用户复购率（下单2次及以上的用户占比）
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) AS repeat_users) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders), 4) AS metric_value

few_shot_examples.question: 商品好评率（评分4分及以上占比）
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews

few_shot_examples.question: 各仓库的出库总量
